command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "########## CAPTURING FULL BODY OF YOUR REAL MESSAGE — 75s ##########"
echo ">>> SEND IN GROUP: @SakuraChanAssistant_bot capture me <<<"
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)

# Capture with large snaplen, write raw, we'll extract the JSON body
sudo timeout 75 tcpdump -i any -n -s 0 -A 'tcp port 8080 and tcp[((tcp[12:1] & 0xf0) >> 2):4] = 0x504f5354' 2>/dev/null > /tmp/real_body.txt &
TCPD=$!

for i in $(seq 1 14); do
  sleep 5
  NEW=$(tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "inbound|response|skip")
  if [ -n "$NEW" ]; then echo "[+$((i*5))s] LOG: $NEW"; fi
done
wait $TCPD 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== FULL captured POST body (the JSON Telegram sent) ==="
# Extract the JSON portion - look for the line with update_id / message
grep -oE '\{"update_id".*\}' /tmp/real_body.txt 2>/dev/null | head -1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    raw = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    d = json.loads(raw)
    msg = d.get('message', {})
    print('text:', repr(msg.get('text')))
    print('entities:', json.dumps(msg.get('entities', []), indent=2))
    print('from:', msg.get('from', {}).get('id'), msg.get('from', {}).get('first_name'))
    print('chat:', msg.get('chat', {}).get('id'), msg.get('chat', {}).get('type'))
except Exception as e:
    print('parse error:', e)
    print('RAW:')
" 2>/dev/null

echo "--- raw body if parse failed ---"
grep -oE '\{"update_id".*' /tmp/real_body.txt 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -c1-600

sudo rm -f /tmp/real_body.txt
REMOTE
